title: Quarterly refresh runbook + new-dataset intake process
context: M6 sustainability. A runbook for quarterly refresh and gated intake of new open datasets through the same pipeline. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Author the quarterly refresh runbook and the gated new-dataset intake process.
acceptanceCriteria: Runbook covers gated intake of new open datasets via the same pipeline (verify -> standardize -> annotate).
